title: Retail Banking — Streams savings & metric governance (TCO)
description: Streams / TCO governance (demo): ES|QL uses demo_streams_capture_on_eligible=1.28 (~60-88% modeled % on typical eligible mix). vis+data_table+esql for POST /api/dashboards 2023-10-31. Aligned with metric-governance-retail-banking-starter.yaml.

config.content:
Demo scenario — full Streams program
~72% modeled savings on eligible metric volume
ES|QL uses demo_streams_capture_on_eligible = 1.28 (cap 88%) — narrative for routing, retention, and downsampling beyond a flat 0.35 lever. Not an Elastic Cloud invoice — tune assumed_usd_per_million_points_month in queries.
## Streams savings — **TCO** (Elastic **Serverless**) **Native dashboard JSON** (same endpoint as Systems Operations): on **Elastic-Api-Version: 2023-10-31**, **`vis` + `metric`** / **`xy`** use **`data_source.type: data_view_reference`**. This dashboard uses **`vis` + `data_table` + `esql`** for arbitrary ES|QL (`modeled_policy_savings_pct`, proxy **$**, trends). **KPI row:** four one-column tables (15m).

config.title: KPI — % of proxy observe bill saved (15m)

data_source.query:
FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes
| STATS metric_points = COUNT(*), points_core_services = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name IN ("payment-engine", "claims-processor", "mobile-gateway", "member-portal", "fraud-sentinel", "policy-manager", "auth-gateway", "document-vault", "quote-engine"), points_governance_lab = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name == "noisy-governance-shipper"
| EVAL metric_points_retail_model = metric_points - COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0)
| EVAL streams_eligible_pct = CASE(metric_points_retail_model == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * (metric_points_retail_model - COALESCE(points_core_services, 0)) / metric_points_retail_model, 2))
| EVAL demo_streams_capture_on_eligible = 1.28
| EVAL modeled_policy_savings_pct = ROUND(LEAST(88.0, streams_eligible_pct * demo_streams_capture_on_eligible), 2)
| EVAL streams_governance_lab_pct = CASE(metric_points == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0) / metric_points, 2))
| EVAL modeled_governance_lab_savings_pct = ROUND(LEAST(95.0, streams_governance_lab_pct * demo_streams_capture_on_eligible), 2)
| EVAL points_in_savings_envelope = ROUND(metric_points_retail_model * modeled_policy_savings_pct / 100.0 + COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0) * modeled_governance_lab_savings_pct / 100.0, 0)
| EVAL assumed_usd_per_million_points_month = 2.50
| EVAL periods_per_month = (30.0 * 24.0 * 60.0) / 15.0
| EVAL estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd = ROUND((metric_points / 1000000.0) * assumed_usd_per_million_points_month * periods_per_month, 2)
| EVAL estimated_monthly_reclaim_usd = ROUND((points_in_savings_envelope / 1000000.0) * assumed_usd_per_million_points_month * periods_per_month, 2)
| EVAL pct_savings_of_estimated_observe_bill = CASE(estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * estimated_monthly_reclaim_usd / estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd, 2))
| KEEP pct_savings_of_estimated_observe_bill

FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes
| STATS metric_points = COUNT(*), points_core_services = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name IN ("payment-engine", "claims-processor", "mobile-gateway", "member-portal", "fraud-sentinel", "policy-manager", "auth-gateway", "document-vault", "quote-engine"), points_governance_lab = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name == "noisy-governance-shipper"

| EVAL demo_streams_capture_on_eligible = 1.28

| EVAL modeled_governance_lab_savings_pct = ROUND(LEAST(95.0, streams_governance_lab_pct * demo_streams_capture_on_eligible), 2)
| EVAL points_in_savings_envelope = ROUND(metric_points_retail_model * modeled_policy_savings_pct / 100.0 + COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0) * modeled_governance_lab_savings_pct / 100.0, 0)

| EVAL estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd = ROUND((metric_points / 1000000.0) * assumed_usd_per_million_points_month * periods_per_month, 2)

| EVAL metric_points_retail_model = metric_points - COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0)
| EVAL streams_eligible_pct = CASE(metric_points_retail_model == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * (metric_points_retail_model - COALESCE(points_core_services, 0)) / metric_points_retail_model, 2))
| EVAL demo_streams_capture_on_eligible = 1.28

| EVAL streams_governance_lab_pct = CASE(metric_points == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0) / metric_points, 2))

| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes
| STATS metric_points = COUNT(*), points_core_services = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name IN ("payment-engine", "claims-processor", "mobile-gateway", "member-portal", "fraud-sentinel", "policy-manager", "auth-gateway", "document-vault", "quote-engine"), points_governance_lab = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name == "noisy-governance-shipper"

| KEEP metric_points, streams_eligible_pct, streams_governance_lab_pct, points_governance_lab

FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes
| STATS metric_points = COUNT(*), points_core_services = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name IN ("payment-engine", "claims-processor", "mobile-gateway", "member-portal", "fraud-sentinel", "policy-manager", "auth-gateway", "document-vault", "quote-engine"), points_governance_lab = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name == "noisy-governance-shipper"
| EVAL metric_points_retail_model = metric_points - COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0)
| EVAL points_other_retail = metric_points_retail_model - COALESCE(points_core_services, 0)
| KEEP metric_points, metric_points_retail_model, points_core_services, points_other_retail, points_governance_lab

config.content:
### Streams levers (Serverless)

**Retention** · **Routing / child streams** · **Downsampling** — headline % uses **`demo_streams_capture_on_eligible`** (1.28) in ES|QL; tune **`assumed_usd_per_million_points_month`** for $ proxies.

data_source.query:
FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes
| STATS metric_points = COUNT(*), points_core_services = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name IN ("payment-engine", "claims-processor", "mobile-gateway", "member-portal", "fraud-sentinel", "policy-manager", "auth-gateway", "document-vault", "quote-engine"), points_governance_lab = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name == "noisy-governance-shipper"
| EVAL metric_points_retail_model = metric_points - COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0)
| EVAL streams_eligible_pct = CASE(metric_points_retail_model == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * (metric_points_retail_model - COALESCE(points_core_services, 0)) / metric_points_retail_model, 2))
| EVAL demo_streams_capture_on_eligible = 1.28
| EVAL modeled_policy_savings_pct = ROUND(LEAST(88.0, streams_eligible_pct * demo_streams_capture_on_eligible), 2)
| EVAL streams_governance_lab_pct = CASE(metric_points == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0) / metric_points, 2))
| EVAL modeled_governance_lab_savings_pct = ROUND(LEAST(95.0, streams_governance_lab_pct * demo_streams_capture_on_eligible), 2)
| EVAL points_in_savings_envelope = ROUND(metric_points_retail_model * modeled_policy_savings_pct / 100.0 + COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0) * modeled_governance_lab_savings_pct / 100.0, 0)
| EVAL assumed_usd_per_million_points_month = 2.50
| EVAL periods_per_month = (30.0 * 24.0 * 60.0) / 15.0
| EVAL estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd = ROUND((metric_points / 1000000.0) * assumed_usd_per_million_points_month * periods_per_month, 2)
| EVAL estimated_monthly_reclaim_usd = ROUND((points_in_savings_envelope / 1000000.0) * assumed_usd_per_million_points_month * periods_per_month, 2)
| EVAL pct_savings_of_estimated_observe_bill = CASE(estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * estimated_monthly_reclaim_usd / estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd, 2))
| KEEP estimated_monthly_reclaim_usd, estimated_monthly_observe_bill_usd, pct_savings_of_estimated_observe_bill, modeled_policy_savings_pct, points_in_savings_envelope, assumed_usd_per_million_points_month, periods_per_month

FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 48 hours
| EVAL hour = DATE_TRUNC(1 hour, @timestamp)
| STATS metric_points = COUNT(*), points_core_services = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name IN ("payment-engine", "claims-processor", "mobile-gateway", "member-portal", "fraud-sentinel", "policy-manager", "auth-gateway", "document-vault", "quote-engine"), points_governance_lab = COUNT(*) WHERE service.name == "noisy-governance-shipper" BY hour
| EVAL metric_points_retail_model = metric_points - COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0)
| EVAL streams_eligible_pct = CASE(metric_points_retail_model == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * (metric_points_retail_model - COALESCE(points_core_services, 0)) / metric_points_retail_model, 2))
| EVAL demo_streams_capture_on_eligible = 1.28
| EVAL modeled_policy_savings_pct = ROUND(LEAST(88.0, streams_eligible_pct * demo_streams_capture_on_eligible), 2)
| EVAL streams_governance_lab_pct = CASE(metric_points == 0, 0.0, ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(points_governance_lab, 0) / metric_points, 2))
| EVAL modeled_governance_lab_savings_pct = ROUND(LEAST(95.0, streams_governance_lab_pct * demo_streams_capture_on_eligible), 2)
| SORT hour DESC
| LIMIT 48

FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 24 hours
| STATS docs = COUNT(*) BY service.name
| SORT docs DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 15 minutes
| STATS docs = COUNT(*) BY data_stream.dataset
| SORT docs DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM metrics*
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 48 hours
| EVAL hour = DATE_TRUNC(1 hour, @timestamp)
| STATS metric_docs = COUNT(*) BY hour
| SORT hour DESC
| LIMIT 72

config.content: **Cases** `[Governance]` · **Streams** · **AI Assistant** — proxies only. **API note:** ES|QL on **2023-10-31** `POST /api/dashboards` uses **`vis` + `data_table`** only. **Demo %** uses **`demo_streams_capture_on_eligible`** in panel queries (not `vis`+`metric`+`esql`).
